sources.cleaned_content:
# Epoca EPA15APVITON 1.5L A-Type Pro Viton Pressure Spray Bottle

SKU: EPA15APVITON

Price: $41.00
Price incl. GST (10%): $3.73
4 payments of $10.25 available.

In stock: 4 available

### Product Image

- https://d2j6dbq0eux0bg.cloudfront.net/images/104650808/4658008031.jpg

## Product Details

Pro Viton sprays gun ideal for oils and mineral fats silicone-based, animal and vegetable oils, aliphatic hydrocarbons and aromatic hydrocarbons. Very good resistance to weather, ozone, oxygen and sunlight. Structural components of the head made from resistant polypropylene.

Features include fast manual depressurization via side wheel (necessary prior to opening the container). Comes equipped with a protective cap that prevents the non-return valve from direct liquid contact extending working life.

### Features

- Ideal for Industrial Cleaning, Building and Construction, Automotive, Agriculture
- Very air efficient allowing long spraying time without the need to repressurize.
- Large pump displacement pressurizes the sprayer with minimal pumps.

### Specifications

- Total capacity: 1860ml
- Operating capacity: 1500ml
- Gasket: VITON
- Nozzle: adjustable
- Safety valve: yes
- Max pressure bar: 3.00
- Pumping rod: PP

## Description

### Epoca Archetype A-Type 1.5 Pro PP Hand Pump Pressure Sprayer with Viton Seals

The 1.5 litre sprayer is fitted gripping notches, placed on top of the tank, to improve the handling of the sprayer, and a sturdy base for stability. A translucent view stripe line with an integrated embossed graduated scale allows the user to monitor easily the level of the tanks content. Structural parts of the head in resistant polypropylene (PP). With Viton seals. Fitted with a 3 bar safety valve.

- 1500ml Operating capacity
- 1860ml Total capacity
- Viton Seals
- PP Hand pumping rod
- View strip with graduated scale
- Stability base
- Gripping notches
- Made in Italy.

### Technical specifications

- Total capacity ml: 1860
- Operating capacity ml: 1500
- Gasket: VITON
- Nozzle: Adjustable
- Safety valve: Yes
- Max pressure bar: 3.00
- Pumping rod: PP

# Spray Bottle - Pressurised, 1.5L, VITON PA-HEAD For Solvents and Petroleum Chemicals (Made in Italy)

SKU: EPA15PROPVITON
Product type: Sprayer
Variants: Sprayer - $54.60, Spare Parts - $19.20

Price: $54.60

### Product Images

- //www.sprintcleaningproducts.com.au/cdn/shop/files/AType_ProPAViton-1_800x.jpg?v=1714452990
- //www.sprintcleaningproducts.com.au/cdn/shop/files/EPSA02_800x.jpg?v=1749183599

## Description

For the fast, hand-sprayed application of strong thinners, solvents, oils and petroleum-based chemicals, such as those used in the Automotive industry.

Structural parts of the head are resistant Polyamide nylon (PA). This prevents swelling of the head which causes pressure loss.

### Features & Benefits

- Structural parts of the head in resistant nylon (PA)
- Safety valve for automatic depressurization at +- 3 bar; it can be used also manually for releasing the pressure, necessary prior to opening the container
- Equipped with a protective cap that protects the non return valve from direct liquid contact prolonging its lifetime.

### Technical Specifications

- Total capacity: 1860ml
- Operating capacity: 1500ml
- Gasket: VITON
- Nozzle: Adjustable
- Safety valve: Yes
- Max pressure: 3.00bar
- Pumping rod: in PP
